case.title: PHILADELPHIA, B & W R. CO. v. SOUTHERN TRANSPORTATION CO

opinion.h: PHILADELPHIA, B & W R. CO. v. SOUTHERN TRANSPORTATION CO, 231 U.S. 750 (1913)
PHILADELPHIA, BALTIMORE, & WASHINGTON RAILROAD COMPANY, Petitioner, v. SOUTHERN TRANSPORTATION COMPANY. No. 723.
Supreme Court of the United States
